tasks.subject: Task 0: R5 브랜치 + prep §8 보류 결정 확정 + spec §10 R5 체크리스트 확장
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `rolestra-phase-r5` 브랜치를 `main` tip(68251d5)에서 분기. prep §8 보류 결정 4건 사용자 confirm(D4/D5/D6/D7 8 Decision Log 반영). spec §10 Phase R5 블록을 R3/R4와 동일한 체크박스+산출물 링크 템플릿으로 확장. `button.tsx`의 `miniBtnStyle` 3 variant 지원 여부 점검(미지원 시 Task 7 보강 메모). tasks.json 14-slot skeleton 작성.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-rolestra-phase-r5.md, docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-rolestra-phase-r5.md.tasks.json, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R5만)

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` == rolestra-phase-r5

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-rolestra-phase-r5.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-rolestra-phase-r5.md.tasks.json","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD","acceptanceCriteria":["rolestra-phase-r5 브랜치 생성","Decision Log에 D4/D5/D6/D7 확정 사항 기록","§10 Phase R5 체크박스+산출물 템플릿 확장","tasks.json 14-slot skeleton 존재","miniBtnStyle 3 variant 지원 여부 확인 결과 plan에 메모"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: 신규 theme token 2개 추가 (messengerHeaderPolicy, badgeRadius)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** prep §5 결정 반영. `messengerHeaderPolicy: 'stacked' | 'mono-prefix'` + `badgeRadius: 'pill' | 'square'` 2개 신규 필드를 `theme-tokens.jsx` schema + 6 object 전부에 추가. `npm run theme:build`로 TS + CSS variable 자동 생성. 테스트로 6 테마 × 2 필드 = 12 단언 추가.

**Files:** docs/Rolestra_sample/theme-tokens.jsx, src/renderer/theme/theme-tokens.ts (자동생성), src/renderer/styles/tokens.css (자동생성), src/renderer/theme/__tests__/theme-tokens.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run theme:build && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- theme-tokens`

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/Rolestra_sample/theme-tokens.jsx","src/renderer/theme/theme-tokens.ts","src/renderer/styles/tokens.css","src/renderer/theme/__tests__/theme-tokens.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run theme:build && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- theme-tokens","acceptanceCriteria":["schema comment + 6 object에 두 필드 존재","ThemeToken 인터페이스에 두 필드 타입 추가","12 단언 테스트 전부 green","typecheck exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Renderer hooks 5종 + active-channel-store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** use-channels / use-dms / use-channel-messages / use-active-channel / use-channel-members + active-channel-store(zustand persist, project-scoped). R4 use-dashboard-kpis 패턴 답습 — silent fallback 금지, strict-mode single-fetch guard, error surface 투명.

**Files:** src/renderer/hooks/{use-channels,use-dms,use-channel-messages,use-active-channel,use-channel-members}.ts + __tests__, src/renderer/stores/active-channel-store.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "use-channels|use-dms|use-channel-messages|use-active-channel|use-channel-members|active-channel-store"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/hooks/use-channels.ts","src/renderer/hooks/use-dms.ts","src/renderer/hooks/use-channel-messages.ts","src/renderer/hooks/use-active-channel.ts","src/renderer/hooks/use-channel-members.ts","src/renderer/stores/active-channel-store.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["5 hooks + 1 store 구현","각 훅·스토어 __tests__ 3+ 케이스(happy/error/null-scope)","strict-mode single-fetch guard 동작","send 성공 후 refetch invoked","use-channel-members는 useMembers+filter 대체 (D6)","typecheck / eslint exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: App view router + MessengerPage skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** App.tsx에 `view: 'dashboard' | 'messenger'` 라우터 도입. NavRail 클릭으로 전환. MessengerPage는 token-only 3-pane skeleton (ChannelRail/Thread/MemberPanel placeholder). Active project 없으면 empty state.

**Files:** src/renderer/App.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/components/shell/NavRail.tsx 수정, src/renderer/features/messenger/MessengerPage.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "App|MessengerPage|NavRail"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/App.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/NavRail.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/MessengerPage.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["NavRail dashboard ↔ messenger 토글 동작","MessengerPage 3-pane layout, hex literal 0","active project null → empty state","App.test + MessengerPage.test green","typecheck / eslint exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ChannelRail (themeKey 3-way) + ChannelRow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 좌측 채널 레일. prep §2.1 3-way 구조 차이 반영(글리프 `#`/`▶·` + radius + clip + 섹션 타이틀). 섹션 순서: system → user → DM. 하단 `+ 새 채널` 버튼. D4 섹션 타이틀 한국어화 (warm=tactical='채널', retro='$ 채널').

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/{ChannelRail,ChannelRow}.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "ChannelRail|ChannelRow"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/ChannelRail.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/ChannelRow.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["3 테마 DOM 차이 단언 (glyph/radius/clip)","섹션 순서 system → user → DM","data-theme-variant={themeKey} 부여","hex literal 0","active click → use-active-channel.set 호출"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Thread + ChannelHeader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 중앙 pane shell — ChannelHeader(# glyph + 채널명 + 참여자수 + 회의시작 버튼) + 메시지 스크롤 영역 + Composer 영역. Channel kind별 UI 분기 (user=회의시작 활성, system_approval/minutes=읽기전용 배지, dm=회의시작 없음). Meeting 활성이면 상단 MeetingBanner placeholder.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/{Thread,ChannelHeader}.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "Thread|ChannelHeader"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/Thread.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/ChannelHeader.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["channel kind 분기 동작","meeting 상태별 버튼 enabled/disabled","system 채널 rename/delete 비활성","typecheck / eslint exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Message + SystemMessage (themeKey 3-way)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 메시지 버블 2종. prep §2.3 구조 차 반영. warm/tactical=ProfileAvatar+baseline header+content, retro(messengerHeaderPolicy='mono-prefix')=avatar 없음+mono name prefix 64px minWidth+header 없음. SystemMessage 3-way (warm pill / tactical outline / retro mono dash). compact 모드 지원.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/{Message,SystemMessage}.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "Message.test|SystemMessage"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/Message.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/SystemMessage.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["warm/tactical: ProfileAvatar + full header 단언","retro: no avatar, mono-prefix 64px minWidth 단언","SystemMessage 3 shape 단언","compact 모드 검증","hex literal 금지 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: MeetingBanner + ApprovalBlock + StartMeetingModal + miniBtnStyle 보강(필요 시)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MeetingBanner 3-way (retro 별도 JSX `[진행중]` strip). ApprovalBlock 3-way container + miniBtnStyle 버튼 재활용 (Task 0 점검 결과 미지원 variant 있으면 이 Task에서 보강). StartMeetingModal(Radix Dialog, 주제 3-200자). 영문 라벨 한국어화 (D4).

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/{MeetingBanner,ApprovalBlock}.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/features/meetings/StartMeetingModal.tsx + __tests__, (필요 시) src/renderer/components/primitives/button.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "MeetingBanner|ApprovalBlock|StartMeetingModal"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/MeetingBanner.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/ApprovalBlock.tsx","src/renderer/features/meetings/StartMeetingModal.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["MeetingBanner 3 테마 DOM + retro 별도 JSX([진행중])","ApprovalBlock approvalBodyStyle='quote' retro 단언 + 한국어 라벨([승인 요청])","StartMeetingModal submit IPC payload 검증","miniBtnStyle 3 variant 지원 확인(또는 보강)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Composer (themeKey 분기 + message:append wire)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 메시지 입력창. D5 결정 — `panelRadius` 재활용 (warm=12/tactical=0/retro=0). glyph 3-way (`✎`/`✎`/`>`) + placeholder font 3-way. readOnly 지원. Enter=전송, Shift+Enter=개행. 전송 실패 시 입력 유지 + inline 에러.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/Composer.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- Composer`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/Composer.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["3 테마 DOM 단언 (glyph/panelRadius/font)","readOnly 배지 + 입력 비활성","Enter 전송, Shift+Enter 개행","전송 실패 시 입력 유지 + 에러 표면","hex literal 금지 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: MemberPanel + SsmBox + small primitives
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 우측 참여자+합의 pane. DashCard 재사용. MemberRow 3-way (warm=circle avatar, tactical=diamond avatar, retro=status-dot only). SsmBox 2-way (tactical clip-path). ProgressGauge 재사용. 공통 small primitive 3종 (TypingIndicator placeholder, DateSeparator, VoteTally).

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/{MemberPanel,MemberRow,SsmBox,TypingIndicator,DateSeparator,VoteTally}.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "MemberPanel|MemberRow|SsmBox|TypingIndicator|DateSeparator|VoteTally"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/MemberPanel.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/MemberRow.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/SsmBox.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/TypingIndicator.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/DateSeparator.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/VoteTally.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["MemberRow 3-way avatar 유무 단언","SsmBox tactical clip 단언","ProgressGauge value/total 정확 전달","typecheck / eslint exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Channel CRUD 모달 3종 (create/rename/delete)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ChannelCreateModal(이름 3-50자 + 멤버 선택) + ChannelRenameDialog + ChannelDeleteConfirm. R4 ProjectCreateModal Radix Dialog 패턴 복제. 시스템 채널 rename/delete 버튼 비활성(defence-in-depth). 중복 이름 DuplicateChannelNameError friendly 표면.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/channels/{ChannelCreateModal,ChannelRenameDialog,ChannelDeleteConfirm}.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "ChannelCreateModal|ChannelRenameDialog|ChannelDeleteConfirm"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/channels/ChannelCreateModal.tsx","src/renderer/features/channels/ChannelRenameDialog.tsx","src/renderer/features/channels/ChannelDeleteConfirm.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["3 모달 기본 동작 + IPC payload 검증","중복 이름 에러 표면","시스템 채널 rename/delete 차단","ESC 닫힘, Enter 제출, role=dialog"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: 시스템 채널 자동 생성 wire-up + DM 시작 UX
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ProjectService.create/linkExternal/importFolder 3 경로에 ChannelService.createSystemChannels 호출 추가. 동일 트랜잭션 선호, 불가 시 후행 호출 + 에러 시 project row 삭제 보상. 생성자에 ChannelService DI. R2 integration-smoke 테스트 조정. DM 시작 버튼(최소 surface) — channel:create kind='dm', DuplicateDmError 시 기존 DM 이동.

**Files:** src/main/projects/project-service.ts + __tests__, src/main/__tests__/r2-integration-smoke.test.ts, src/renderer/features/members/StartDmButton.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "project-service|r2-integration|StartDmButton"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/projects/project-service.ts","src/main/__tests__/r2-integration-smoke.test.ts","src/renderer/features/members/StartDmButton.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["create/linkExternal/importFolder 모두 system channel 3 row 자동 생성","실패 시 orphan project row 없음","DM 버튼: 신규/기존 2 경로 동작","integration smoke green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: i18n populate (messenger.*) + parser keepRemoved 확장
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R5 모든 t() 키 ko/en populate. D4 반영 — 영문 라벨 전체 한국어화, retro는 한국어 터미널 스타일 ($ 채널, [진행중], [승인 요청] 등). i18next-parser.config.js keepRemoved 9+ regex 추가로 dynamic 테마 키 보호.

**Files:** src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, i18next-parser.config.js

**Verify:** `npm run i18n:check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json","i18next-parser.config.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm run i18n:check","acceptanceCriteria":["모든 R5 t() 호출이 ko/en 대응 키 존재","i18n:check idempotent clean","keepRemoved regex로 3-way dynamic 키 보호","영문 라벨 한국어화 전체 적용"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Playwright Electron E2E + Done-checklist + spec §10 R5 체크박스 ✓
tasks.description:
**Goal:** e2e/messenger-flow.spec.ts 신규 시나리오(프로젝트 생성 → messenger 이동 → 시스템 채널 3개 확인 → 사용자 채널 '기획' 생성 → 메시지 '안녕하세요' 전송 → Thread 렌더 확인 → 채널 전환 동작). WSL 제약 시 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS 허용. r5-done-checklist.md 작성. spec §10 R5 체크박스 전부 ✓ + 산출물 링크 실경로. tasks.json 14/14 completed. 최종 6 script exit 0 재확인.

**Files:** e2e/messenger-flow.spec.ts, e2e/playwright.config.ts 수정, docs/superpowers/specs/r5-done-checklist.md, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R5 체크박스), docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-rolestra-phase-r5.md.tasks.json

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run i18n:check && npm run theme:check && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["e2e/messenger-flow.spec.ts","docs/superpowers/specs/r5-done-checklist.md","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-rolestra-phase-r5.md.tasks.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run i18n:check && npm run theme:check && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["Playwright spec 작성 + config 업데이트","로컬 pass 또는 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS 명시","done-checklist 전체 산출물 링크 실경로","§10 R5 체크박스 전부 ✓","tasks.json 14/14 completed","6 script 전부 exit 0"]}
```
